scenarios.name: mixed_vi_en
scenarios.text: Tang moment xoan cho cum rotary actuator o khop goi len 15 phan tram, dong thoi check lai sensor vision giup anh.
scenarios.purpose: Primary mixed Vietnamese-English technical command with comma and final sentence boundary.

scenarios.name: barge_in
scenarios.text: Robot dang bao cao trang thai pin, nhiet do actuator, torque limit, va chuan bi tiep tuc phan tich sensor vision.
scenarios.purpose: Long response used to verify interruption, TTS cancel, and audio buffer flush.
